title: WebDancer: Building Web Information-Seeking Agents with a Data-Centric and Training-Stage Perspective

defines.name: WebDancer
defines.definition: A ReAct-based web information-seeking agent trained through a four-stage data-centric pipeline of browsing data construction, trajectory sampling, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning.

problem: Existing web information-seeking agents rely on shallow datasets and limited training paradigms that do not sufficiently support complex, long-horizon, real-world search and reasoning.
